FDX.catalyst_summary: FedEx reported Q3 FY2026 after market close with consensus calling for $4.12 EPS and $23.48B revenue; prediction markets assigned 94% probability of a beat. DRIVE cost-reduction program is the key margin driver.

ALGN.catalyst_summary: Elliott Investment Management disclosed a significant stake in Align Technology (Invisalign maker). Elliott typically pushes for buybacks or strategic review. Stock rose 2.23% to $176.25 with room to run toward $208 52-week high.

PTGX.catalyst_summary: FDA approved ICOTYDE (icotrokinra) for plaque psoriasis on March 18 — first-ever oral IL-23 receptor targeted peptide. PTGX co-developed with J&J and receives royalties. Rose +5% to $101.94.

MU.catalyst_summary: Micron delivered historic Q2 FY2026 blowout — revenue $23.86B vs $12.9B est, EPS $12.20 vs $8.80 est. Q3 guidance of $33.5B revenue. Stock fell 3.8% in sell-the-news reaction.

AXTI.catalyst_summary: AXT Inc surged 19% to $58 on InP demand for AI infrastructure. Wedbush and Northland raised targets citing 42% projected 2-year revenue CAGR and customer wins at Google/Amazon.

TSEM.catalyst_summary: Tower Semiconductor surged 17% to $166 after partnership with Oriole Networks for silicon photonics AI networking. Hit all-time high.

DLTH.catalyst_summary: Duluth Holdings beat Q4 adj EPS by 109% ($0.23 vs $0.11 est) and revenue by 14.5%. Net income turned positive. Stock +44.7% to $3.14.

LIDR.catalyst_summary: AEye joined NVIDIA Halos AI Systems Inspection Lab. Q4 revenue +110%. Holds $86.5M cash with runway into 2028.

JNJ.catalyst_summary: FDA approved ICOTYDE (icotrokinra) on March 18 — first oral IL-23 receptor antagonist for plaque psoriasis. Targets 8M+ US patients.

CAL.catalyst_summary: Caleres beat Q4 earnings, +18.9% to $10.53. Stock remains 42% below $18.27 52-week high.

NVDA.catalyst_summary: NVIDIA fell 1% to $178.56 amid RISK_OFF rotation away from AI megacaps. MU blowout confirms AI demand but macro headwinds dominate.

ACN.catalyst_summary: Accenture beat Q2 EPS but guided full-year below consensus, triggering -3.5% selloff. Signals slowing IT consulting demand.

ELA.catalyst_summary: Envela surged 32% on 21x normal volume with no identified catalyst. Likely low-float momentum trade.

DRI.catalyst_summary: Darden Restaurants in-line Q3, +1.85%. Defensive consumer play in RISK_OFF environment.

BABA.catalyst_summary: Alibaba revenue miss, stock fell 7% to $124.91. China macro risk and geopolitical exposure persist.

CSIQ.catalyst_summary: Canadian Solar Q4 EPS -$1.66 vs -$0.47 est (253% miss). Net loss $131M. Solar oversupply and tariff uncertainty.

YRD.catalyst_summary: Yiren Digital plunged 44% on earnings miss. Near 52-week low at $2.06. No reversal catalyst.

ZKH.catalyst_summary: ZKH Group fell 30.6% to $2.27 on Q4 earnings miss. Only 70K avg daily volume.

market_context.sector_rotation: Rotating out of AI megacaps into idiosyncratic catalysts. Biotech/pharma benefiting from FDA cycle.
market_context.macro_risk: VIX 24.34 elevated. Accenture guidance cut signals slowing IT demand. FedEx AH results are macro bellwether.
